project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Quant Ecosystem multi-app platform
build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turbo for task orchestration. Packages live in packages/, apps in apps/, services in services/
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals:true, coverage via @vitest/coverage-v8. Tests placed in src/__tests__/ as .test.ts files
verification_instructions: 1) Run pnpm install in workspace root. 2) Run typecheck. 3) Run vitest for the new package.
setup_instructions: pnpm install at workspace root. No additional setup needed for library packages.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm. Node >=22, TypeScript ~5.5.0, pnpm@10.28.1.
contribution_requirements: Strict TypeScript, ESM modules (type: module), follow existing package patterns (package.json scripts: typecheck, test, build), use zod for validation, export from barrel index.ts
key_patterns: Each package has package.json with main/types pointing to src/index.ts, a tsconfig.json extending root, and src/__tests__/ for tests. Route files use Fastify plugin pattern with zod schema validation. Services are class-based. The existing @quant/recommendations package has AntiRageScorer in src/ranking/anti-rage.ts and ExperimentService in src/experiment/experiment-service.ts that this package integrates with.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, tsconfig.json, turbo.json, vitest.config.ts. packages/ contains 35+ library packages. apps/ has application backends with routes/. services/ has standalone services.
